CustomField.description: This field identifies the measurement systems Radius Search values. It can be 'Miles' or 'mi', or 'Kilometers' or 'km'. The default value is 'mi'.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field identifies the measurement systems Radius Search values. It can be 'Miles' or 'mi', or 'Kilometers' or 'km'. The default value is 'mi'.
CustomField.label: Radius Search Units
